key_risks: Biotech momentum reversal after sharp 7d gain
Sticky CPI (+4.2% YoY) triggers further rate-driven equity selloff
Small-cap and regional bank exposure vulnerable if credit/growth fears intensify
Continued semiconductor weakness spilling into broader risk assets

portfolio.rationale: Strong momentum (+8.7% 7d, +11.8% 30d) with rotation into healthcare amid tech weakness.
Outperforming with positive 7d return; strong retail sales and breadth supportive.
Positive 7d and 30d returns showing factor leadership amid mega-cap tech selloff.
Positive momentum, steep yield curve, strong retail sales support credit conditions.
Defensive ballast given S&P weakness and elevated CPI; hedge against further drawdown.

portfolio_rationale: Tilt away from cap-weighted tech weakness (Micron/Nvidia/Samsung selloff dragging SPY/QQQ) toward areas showing positive 1-week momentum: biotech breakout, small caps, and regional banks. Short treasuries provide ballast.
rationale_summary: Avoid mega-cap tech drag; lean into biotech momentum, small caps, and broadening breadth themes for a one-week window.
